name: feishu
description: Open-source Feishu plugin for Codex with stable IM, Docs, Wiki, and team workflow capabilities.

interface.shortDescription: Summarize chats, search docs, and push Codex updates to Feishu.
interface.longDescription: Feishu for Codex is an open-source plugin for teams that use Feishu for collaboration. It provides stable OpenAPI-backed tools for chat summaries, bot-style conversations, Docs and Wiki retrieval, event subscription webhooks, and periodic project digests pushed from Codex into Feishu.
defaultPrompt: Draft a Codex project update and send it to Feishu.
Search Feishu Docs and Wiki for this topic.
Summarize the latest messages in this Feishu group.
